headline: Cigna CEO Succession Puts Focus On Valuation Debt And AI Priorities
summary: Cigna Group (NYSE:CI) announced that CEO David M. Cordani plans to retire. Brian Evanko, current president and COO, is set to succeed him as CEO effective July 1, 2026. The transition signals continuity in leadership while opening room for changes in how Cigna Group uses data, technology, and AI across its operations. Cigna Group, through its health services and insurance offerings, sits at the center of ongoing shifts in how healthcare is paid for, delivered, and analyzed. As payers and...

headline: Health Insurance Providers Stocks Q4 Recap: Benchmarking Cigna (NYSE:CI)
summary: As the Q4 earnings season comes to a close, it’s time to take stock of this quarter’s best and worst performers in the health insurance providers industry, including Cigna (NYSE:CI) and its peers.
